description_long: This object consists of two large, black plastic garbage bags, each tied securely at the top with a visible knot. The bags have a glossy, reflective surface that catches the light, highlighting their crinkled and irregular contours. Both bags appear to be moderately full, with bulging sides and creases that suggest a mix of soft and irregularly shaped contents inside. The plastic material is thin and flexible, with no visible tears or holes, and the bags are opaque, concealing their contents. There are no printed labels, logos, or markings on the exterior surfaces. The bags are shown resting upright on a flat surface, typical of how garbage bags might be found on a street or sidewalk awaiting collection.
description: Two glossy black plastic garbage bags, tied at the top, moderately full and resting upright with crinkled, bulging surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bags, with the larger bag in front and the smaller bag behind, both tied at the top and displaying prominent surface reflections.
description_view_1: Side view with the smaller bag in the foreground and the larger bag behind, highlighting the bags' rounded, bulging shapes and glossy finish.
description_view_2: Rear view with the larger bag on the right and the smaller bag on the left, both showing their tied tops and smooth, shiny surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with both bags side by side, emphasizing their fullness and the reflective, crinkled plastic material.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: moderately full and bulging, with visible surface tension and creases
